marker: [CITATION NEEDED: prior meta-analysis of rTMS in Alzheimer's disease]
external_suggestion: Prior systematic review/meta-analysis specifically of rTMS in Alzheimer's disease reporting cognitive effect sizes on global cognition measures; e.g., a meta-analysis of rTMS for AD cognition outcomes.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: prior meta-analysis of tDCS in MCI and AD]
external_suggestion: Prior meta-analysis/systematic review of tDCS in MCI and/or Alzheimer's disease reporting pooled cognitive effect sizes, ideally separated for global cognition.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: meta-analysis reporting ADAS-Cog improvement with NIBS]
external_suggestion: Meta-analysis of non-invasive brain stimulation (rTMS/tDCS/tACS or broader NIBS) in AD/MCI that specifically reports pooled improvement on ADAS-Cog.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: systematic review of domain-specific NIBS effects in MCI/AD]
external_suggestion: Systematic review of NIBS in MCI/AD that discusses domain-specific cognitive effects, especially memory/language benefits versus less consistent executive or functional outcomes.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: mechanistic review of rTMS and LTP in human cortex]
external_suggestion: Mechanistic review on rTMS-induced cortical excitability changes and LTP-/LTD-like plasticity in humans; classic neurophysiology review rather than a disease-specific trial.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: synaptic plasticity window in early AD neuropathology]
external_suggestion: Neuropathology/mechanistic review describing preserved but declining synaptic plasticity in prodromal or early Alzheimer's disease, with reduced plasticity as disease advances.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: functional connectivity of DLPFC-hippocampal memory network]
external_suggestion: Functional neuroimaging/connectivity study or review showing DLPFC interactions with hippocampal/parietal memory networks during episodic encoding and retrieval.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: gamma tACS and neural oscillation entrainment in AD]
external_suggestion: Mechanistic review or experimental study on gamma-frequency tACS/entrainment in Alzheimer's disease or aging, showing modulation of gamma oscillations/network synchrony.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: blinding adequacy and sham credibility in rTMS and tDCS trials]
external_suggestion: Methodological review or consensus paper on sham stimulation, participant unblinding, and blinding adequacy in rTMS and tDCS randomized trials.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: effect size of cholinesterase inhibitors on MMSE in AD]
external_suggestion: Meta-analysis or Cochrane review of cholinesterase inhibitors in Alzheimer's disease reporting MMSE change of roughly 1–3 points over 6–12 months and corresponding small standardized effects.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: CONSORT extension for non-pharmacological interventions]
external_suggestion: CONSORT extension statement for randomized trials of nonpharmacologic/non-pharmacological treatments (e.g., Boutron et al. CONSORT extension).

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: WHO World Alzheimer Report prevalence estimates]
external_suggestion: Global prevalence report from WHO or WHO-backed dementia fact sheet/report giving AD as 60–70% of dementia cases and ~55 million people living with dementia worldwide.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: Alzheimer's Disease International Global Prevalence Report]
external_suggestion: Alzheimer's Disease International World Alzheimer Report with global prevalence/projection estimates, including ~55 million currently and ~139 million by 2050.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: global cost-of-dementia estimates]
external_suggestion: World Alzheimer Report or equivalent global economic analysis reporting annual dementia costs exceeding USD 1.3 trillion.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: Petersen criteria and NIA-AA MCI diagnostic framework]
external_suggestion: Seminal diagnostic criteria papers: Petersen criteria for MCI and NIA-AA recommendations/framework for MCI due to Alzheimer's disease.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: MCI prevalence meta-analysis]
external_suggestion: Population-based systematic review/meta-analysis estimating MCI prevalence in adults aged 65+ at approximately 15–20%.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: MCI-to-AD conversion rate longitudinal studies]
external_suggestion: Longitudinal cohort studies or meta-analysis on amnestic MCI progression to Alzheimer's dementia, reporting annual conversion rates around 10–15%.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: synaptic plasticity in early AD neuropathology]
external_suggestion: Mechanistic/neuropathology review on early Alzheimer's disease showing retained but vulnerable neuronal network plasticity before advanced neurodegeneration.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: Cochrane review of ChEIs in AD and MCI]
external_suggestion: Cochrane review(s) of cholinesterase inhibitors in Alzheimer's disease and, if needed separately, Cochrane/systematic review in MCI showing modest symptomatic benefit and adverse effects.

marker: [CITATION NEEDED: FDA approval and safety data for lecanemab/donanemab]
external_suggestion: Regulatory/phase 3 trial references for lecanemab and donanemab, including FDA approval announcements/labels and pivotal trial papers reporting ARIA and infusion-related safety data.
